sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114056" key="xio/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῐόν-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n114056.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eye-salve,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:2:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
